subject: [PATCH v2] mm/mempolicy: track page allocations per mempolicy

reviews.author: JP Kobryn (Meta)
reviews.summary: Questioned the need for monotonic increasing metrics and suggested an alternative approach using tracepoints and BPF combination.

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Provided a counterargument to JP Kobryn's suggestion, highlighting the advantages of collecting stats from the same source as existing per-node reclaim stats.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: The patch aims to track page allocations per mempolicy, but the approach is questioned by JP Kobryn.
